title: Drone strike
description: 👀 In Ukraine, they tested the control of an FPV drone through GTA V. The sensations turned out to be close to a real flight. According to the Ministry of Defense, for this they used a special mod and connected the controller. They say that the simulation turned out to be "surprisingly similar" to the actual flight. It is noted that this does not replace real training, but is suitable for practice and experiments. Oh shit, five billion drones are...
description_en: 👀 In Ukraine, they tested the control of an FPV drone through GTA V. The sensations turned out to be close to a real flight. According to the Ministry of Defense, for this they used a special mod and connected the controller. They say that the simulation turned out to be "surprisingly similar" to the actual flight. It is noted that this does not replace real training, but is suitable for practice and experiments. Oh shit, five billion drones are...
description_uk: 👀 В Украине протестировали управление FPV-дроном через GTA V. Ощущения оказались близкими к реальному полету Как сообщает Минобороны, для этого использовали специальный мод и подключили контроллер. Говорят, что симуляция оказалась "напрочуд схожей" с настоящим полетом. Отмечается, что это не заменяет реальные тренировки, но подходит для практики и экспериментов. Oh shit, five billion drones are...

title: Missile launch detected
description: 🤬 Russia released a record 6,583 long-range drones over Ukraine in April, - AFP Reportedly, the number of launches increased by 2% compared to March. At the same time, the Russian Federation began to strike more often during the day, which is connected with the demand to increase civilian casualties. The number of missiles also increased to 141, although this is less than in February. According to the data of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, in April it was possible to intercept about 88% of all targets.
description_en: 🤬 Russia released a record 6,583 long-range drones over Ukraine in April, - AFP Reportedly, the number of launches increased by 2% compared to March. At the same time, the Russian Federation began to strike more often during the day, which is connected with the demand to increase civilian casualties. The number of missiles also increased to 141, although this is less than in February. According to the data of the Armed Forces of Ukraine, in April it was possible to intercept about 88% of all targets.
description_uk: 🤬 россия выпустила рекордные 6583 дальнобойных дрона по Украине в апреле, - AFP Как сообщается, количество запусков выросло на 2% по сравнению с мартом. Одновременно рф стала чаще наносить удары днем, что связывается с попыткой увеличить потери среди гражданских. Число ракет также выросло до 141, хотя это меньше, чем в феврале. По данным ВС ВСУ, в апреле удалось перехватить около 88% всех целей.

title: Ternopil: Explosions reported
description: Breaking: Ukraine’s Ternopil struck in mass Russian daytime drone attack. Explosions were reported in the city early in the afternoon and are ongoing, with multiple blasts reported across the city, according to Suspilne. Photo: Camille Pajor.

description_uk: За підсумками цього квітня наші далекобійні санкції вийшли на новий рівень за трьома компонентами: скорочення російського нафтового прибутку, дистанція та інтенсивність санкцій. Важливо, що не тільки досягається сам обʼєкт, як це визначено бойовим завданням, але і збільшується час простою обʼєкта або принаймні відчутне скорочення його роботи. title: Kyiv: 210 drones launched
description: At least 1 killed, 52 injured in Russian attacks on Ukraine over past day. Russian forces launched an Iskander-M ballistic missile and 210 drones against Ukraine overnight, the Air Force said. It reported downing 190 drones.

title: Kharkiv: Drone strike near civilians
title_uk: Харків: удар безпілотників по мирних жителях
description: This night, the Russians again fought against ordinary high-rise buildings in Odesa - as of now, five people were injured and two houses were on fire. Also, in Kryvyi Rih, a person was injured due to a drone strike. In Kharkiv Oblast, railway infrastructure was attacked, traction substations were hit. There was damage and a fire in the wagons. Thousands of families lost power due to shelling. They were also in Sumy Oblast and Zaporizhzhia...
description_en: This night, the Russians again fought against ordinary high-rise buildings in Odesa - as of now, five people were injured and two houses were on fire. Also, in Kryvyi Rih, a person was injured due to a drone strike. In Kharkiv Oblast, railway infrastructure was attacked, traction substations were hit. There was damage and a fire in the wagons. Thousands of families lost power due to shelling. They were also in Sumy Oblast and Zaporizhzhia...
description_uk: Цієї ночі росіяни знову воювали проти звичайних багатоповерхівок в Одесі – станом на зараз відомо про пʼятьох поранених та пожежі у двох будинках. Також у Кривому Розі через удар дроном поранено людину. На Харківщині атакували залізничну інфраструктуру, били по тягових підстанціях. Були пошкодження, пожежа вагонів. Через обстріл знеструмлено тисячі сімей. Били також по Сумщині та Запорізькій...

description: Military releases video of Ukrainian drones striking key Russian drone development complex. Ukrainian drones struck a key Russian drone development complex in occupied Zaporizhzhia Oblast, causing damage to multiple facilities, the 413th "Raid" Regiment of Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces reported on April 30.
